{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = White ghouls
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[White ghouls]] crawl up from the ground.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
